full_text:
Lu Bo (Jingxuan)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Bo, styledJingxuan, was born in Chenliu in Xijin. Skilled writer, recommended to Sima Zhao by Ruan Ji and used by Sima Rong. Lu Bo was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
